calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proof Of The Successor Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: J. Brian McCauley, via Zoom, for Angela Cincotta, Petitioner; William Lynch, via Zoom, for Annette Traverso, Trustee.

Mr. McCauley reports that his client has consulted with at least four bonding companies to obtain a bond in the amount ordered by the court but has been unsuccessful in doing so and accordingly, would need to resign should the court require the bond amount stay as ordered. Mr. McCauley advises that a Stipulation and Request to Waive Trustee's Bond was filed on May-16-2022. After additional discussion, the court instructs Mr. McCauley to submit an updated Proposed Amended Order Appointing Successor Trustee with language added in item number two (2) regarding waiver of bond to the court via email to the courtroom clerk. The clerk provides Mr. McCauley with their email address.

The Status on Filing Proof of Successor Trustee Bond is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Duong. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Proof Of The Successor Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Continued To Jun-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Successor Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Continued To May-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John McCauley, via ZOOM, for Angela Cincotta, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel regarding Annette Traverso's consent. Counsel offers oral advocacy regarding the preceding and points to his petition for information regarding Annette Traverso's consent as well as bond amount. Counsel reports that he does not have waivers from all beneficiaries. The court advises counsel that it rarely orders a reduced bond but that the bond amount shall be determined. Counsel offers additional testimony regarding the history of the trust as well as advocacy for the petition. The court advises that the issue regarding notice of the amended petition is being waived at this time.

The Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez Not reported.
